title: Every gate step applies the level-aware bypass rule + machine-check guard
action: Make each gate-presenting skill step apply the canonical level-aware bypass rule: bee-exploring Gate 1 and bee-planning Gate 2 gain a bypass check (read gate_bypass_level, self-approve + audit + continue when covered); bee-validating Gate 3 and go-mode replaced their stale normal-only text (full/total lift the high-risk floor). New machine-check scripts/test_gate_bypass_doctrine.mjs asserts each gate surface has the level-aware carve-out and no stale phrase, joined to commands.verify.

truths: bee-exploring Gate 1 and bee-planning Gate 2 steps read gate_bypass_level and self-approve when the level covers the gate
bee-validating Gate 3 and go-mode are level-aware (full/total lift the high-risk floor); no 'safety floor is absolute' / 'bypass does not apply' stale phrasing remains
test_gate_bypass_doctrine.mjs passes, its sentinel bites, and it is in commands.verify (14 suites)
prohibitions: do not weaken the normal-level safety floor (normal still stops high-risk)

trace.outcome: Every gate step now applies the level-aware bypass rule: Gate 1 (exploring) + Gate 2 (planning) gained the carve-out they lacked; Gate 3 (validating) + go-mode replaced stale normal-only text with full/total floor-lift. A Codex runtime under total now self-approves Gates 1-3 and ships straight through instead of stopping. Machine-check test_gate_bypass_doctrine.mjs guards it in verify (14 suites).
trace.verify_output: gate-bypass doctrine 0 failures; all 4 gate surfaces level-aware; sentinel bites; full 14-suite chain green
